title: Spanish Rice Krispie Paella
description: A creative fusion of traditional Spanish paella and childhood Rice Krispie treats, perfect for a fun and easy meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the paella rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the chicken broth, saffron, and smoked paprika.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked.
Meanwhile, melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a separate saucepan over low heat.
Add the Rice Krispies and stir until coated in the melted butter.
Flatten the Rice Krispie mixture into a large rectangle.
Once the paella is cooked, place the Rice Krispie rectangle on top of the paella.
Use playful play dough to create fun designs on the Rice Krispie topping.
